ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ship_modes" (
  "ship_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping mode */,
  "ship_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping mode (e.g., Second Class, Standard Class) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping mode */,
  "shipping_provider" TEXT /* Shipping provider used for the ship mode (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time for the ship mode (in days) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit for the ship mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., Consumer, Corporate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., South, West) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the product belongs to */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product (in kg) */,
  "product_volume" REAL /* Volume of the product (in cubic meters) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Furniture, Office Supplies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category (e.g., Bookcases, Chairs) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the product */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the order item (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_per_dollar" INTEGER /* Number of points earned per dollar spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Code for the discount */,
  "discount_description" TEXT /* Description of the discount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., sales manager, shipping operator, customer service representative) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
